---
title: "Ornstein–Uhlenbeck Process for Pairs Trading"
author: "Rohan Jayanti, Yat Wai Heung"
format:
  html:
    theme: superhero
    embed-resources: true
    toc: true
    number-sections: true
    fig-width: 8
    fig-height: 4.5
    toc-depth: 3
---


# Ornstein–Uhlenbeck Process for Pairs Trading

## Project aims

This project develops the Ornstein-Uhlenbeck (OU) process as a model for mean-reverting spreads in pairs trading.

## Research Notes

💡 Right click and open in new tab for best viewing.

- 👉[Ornstein-Uhlenbeck theory notebook](notebooks/ou_theory.html)
- 👉[Numerical Validation of OU transition](notebooks/ou_validation.html)
